rules.remediation: No remediation; this rule verifies rule engine execution.
Commit the package-manager lockfile for each manifest where the ecosystem supports lockfiles.

profiles.name: Baseline
profiles.description: Default hardening checks for common repository package-manager configuration.

profiles.name: Strict
profiles.description: Higher-signal hardening checks for repositories that want a more restrictive posture.

profiles.name: Socket Firewall
profiles.description: Checks relevant to repositories using Socket Firewall controls.

profiles.name: Veracode Package Firewall
profiles.description: Checks relevant to repositories using Veracode Package Firewall controls.

profiles.name: Private Registry
profiles.description: Checks relevant to repositories that route dependencies through private registries.
